name: pull_request_review_findings
input_prompt: Review this pull request for regressions
sample_with_pack: # Findings
P1: `src/api/orders.ts:118` now returns cached order totals before applying the tenant filter. Risk: users can see totals from another tenant when the shared cache key is reused.
Evidence: run `npm test -- orders.cache.test.ts -t tenant` and inspect the failing assertion for tenant B receiving tenant A's total.
P2: `src/components/OrderSummary.tsx:42` no longer handles the empty discount state, which regresses the existing no-discount checkout path.
Next step: include `tenant_id` in the cache key, restore the empty-state branch, and add a regression test before merge.
sample_without_pack: The pull request generally looks good but may need more testing.
There could be edge cases around caching and UI states.
I recommend checking the affected areas before merging.

name: incident_postmortem
input_prompt: Write a postmortem for payment webhook failures
sample_with_pack: Current state: payment webhooks failed for 36 minutes on April 24 after the deploy that changed `src/payments/webhook.ts` signature verification.
Timeline: 09:42 deploy completed, 09:47 first Stripe retry spike, 10:03 support ticket opened, 10:18 rollback completed, 10:24 backlog replay finished.
Root cause: `src/payments/webhook.ts:64` parsed JSON before verifying the raw webhook body, so Stripe signatures no longer matched.
Impact: 184 payment events were delayed; no confirmed double-charge or data loss was found in `payments.replay_audit`.
Action item: Owner Backend, restore raw-body verification and run `npm test -- payments.webhook.test.ts`; Owner DevOps, add an alert for webhook retry rate above 5% for 10 minutes.
sample_without_pack: There was an issue with webhooks after a deploy.
The team rolled back and things returned to normal.
We should improve monitoring and testing to avoid this in the future.

name: technical_design_decision
input_prompt: Decide whether to use Redis or Postgres advisory locks
sample_with_pack: Decision: use Postgres advisory locks for `src/jobs/reconcile_invoices.py` because the job already runs inside the billing database transaction boundary.
Tradeoff: Redis would reduce database coupling, but it adds a second availability dependency and does not protect the invoice rows if the database transaction rolls back.
Implementation: add `pg_advisory_xact_lock(invoice_id)` in `src/jobs/reconcile_invoices.py`, document the lock key in `docs/billing-jobs.md`, and keep the lock scoped to each invoice.
Validation: run `pytest tests/billing/test_reconcile_invoices.py -k advisory_lock` and verify the migration is not required because advisory locks do not add schema.
Risk: long-running invoice reconciliation can hold locks longer than expected; add a 30-second job timeout before enabling this in production.
sample_without_pack: Both Redis and Postgres locks can work depending on the architecture.
Postgres may be simpler, while Redis can be faster.
Choose the option that best fits your needs and test it carefully.

name: frontend_design_handoff
input_prompt: Summarize the UI implementation handoff for a premium dashboard
sample_with_pack: Current state: `src/styles/tokens.css`, `src/pages/Dashboard.tsx`, and `src/components/MetricTile.tsx` implement the premium dashboard direction.

Design decision: use the Obsidian Ledger palette, `Space Grotesk` headings, `IBM Plex Sans` body text, 24px section spacing, 18px tile radius, and a layered shadow token instead of generic white cards.
Interaction decision: metric tiles use hover lift and focus glow; the chart region uses entrance fade-up with a 90ms stagger.
Evidence: run `npm run build`, `npm test -- Dashboard`, and `npx playwright test dashboard.spec.ts --project=chromium`.
Next step: QA contrast on the revenue and churn tiles before release because those use the highest accent saturation.
sample_without_pack: The dashboard UI was updated to look modern and premium.
It uses better colors, fonts, cards, and animations.
Test it in the browser and make sure it looks good.

name: vietnamese_project_status
input_prompt: Viết báo cáo trạng thái dự án cho stakeholder không chuyên kỹ thuật
sample_with_pack: Mục đích: báo cáo này giúp người đọc không chuyên kỹ thuật hiểu trạng thái hiện tại, phạm vi đã hoàn thành, bằng chứng kiểm chứng, và phần còn cần theo dõi.
Trạng thái: quality gate đang pass ở mức bắt buộc; `python -m pytest skills/tests -q` đạt 197/197 và `python skills/tests/smoke_test.py` đạt 63/63.
Bằng chứng bổ sung: `python skills/codex-execution-quality-gate/scripts/auto_gate.py --project-root D:\CodexAI---Skills --mode full` trả về overall pass, security 0 critical và 0 warnings.
Rủi ro: tech debt scan vẫn còn 174 tín hiệu advisory, chủ yếu là long functions, long files, và duplicate blocks; đây chưa phải lỗi chặn release nhưng cần kế hoạch dọn theo đợt.
Người phụ trách: maintainer pack xác nhận các tín hiệu advisory theo từng skill; Bước tiếp theo: ưu tiên xử lý các file có duplicate block cao trước khi mở rộng thêm corpus benchmark.
sample_without_pack: Dự án hiện đang ổn và đã được kiểm tra.
Một số cải tiến đã được thực hiện để nâng cao chất lượng.
Vẫn còn vài điểm cần theo dõi trong thời gian tới.
